title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-control-center and gnome-settings-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: A daemon to share settings from GNOME to other applications. It also handles global keybindings, as well as a number of desktop-wide settings.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Sync minor subscription manager integration fixes from RHEL 9 (JIRA:RHEL-5074)  Icons lost in zh_CN environment (JIRA:RHEL-4180)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Sync minor subscription manager integration fixes from RHEL 9

full_text:
An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

A daemon to share settings from GNOME to other applications. It also handles global keybindings, as well as a number of desktop-wide settings.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Sync minor subscription manager integration fixes from RHEL 9 (JIRA:RHEL-5074)  Icons lost in zh_CN environment (JIRA:RHEL-4180)
